NAME: Westlake gut bacteria GWAS
DESCRIPTION: Genome-wide association analyses for human gut bacteria in Han Chinese (n = 7,935) from the Westlake Chinese Multi-omics GWAS Catalog. N_MICROBES matches the bacteria phenotypes.tsv table on the portal (2026).
CITATION: Laboratory of Precision Nutrition and Computational Medicine, Westlake University. Gut bacteria GWAS summary statistics, Han Chinese (n = 7,935). Westlake Chinese Multi-omics GWAS Catalog. https://omics.lab.westlake.edu.cn/data.html (accessed 2026).
